summary: Iteration 10 — Self-DM ('Me, myself and I') backend + ClanChat Profile 3-tab restructure (media/wall/audio) frontend testing. 8/8 backend tests pass. Frontend tabs, pinned ribbon, boards-in-wall, board creation, wall posting, self-thread UI, send-to-self all verified working. Regression smoke (feed/search/compose/settings/watchlist/groups) clean — no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2471 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting DMs / posts / boards / admin / watchlist into separate router modules. This will keep getting worse each iteration.

send_dm self-branch uses is_self flag computed once, but the recipient existence check is skipped entirely for self-sends — safe because recipient_id == user_id is guaranteed by current_user, but worth a comment noting why the 404 path is intentionally skipped.

list_threads always appends a self_thread even if the aggregation pipeline returned no docs, which is correct — but the empty self-thread is built with public_user(user) rather than a dedicated helper; if public_user ever leaks fields you don't want to echo back to the owner, this is a foot-gun.
Profile.jsx WallTab now has both boards UI and wall-post UI in a single ~120 line render. As the wall grows it's already non-trivial; consider extracting BoardsSection into its own component.

Onboarding modal ('Three tiers. One simple rule.') intercepts pointer events over the tabs strip on first login. Not a regression in this iteration, but worth giving it a higher z-only-while-not-dismissed or a backdrop click-through so the underlying UI isn't visually 'frozen' to a tester. Functional users will dismiss it, so low priority.
test_credentials: alice@clanchat.app / Password123! ; bob@clanchat.app / Password123! — both confirmed working
seed_data_creation: Created one 'Test Board ####' board on alice's profile (tier=followers). Several self-DMs from alice marked with 'saved note', 'history seed', 'SECRET-xxxxxxx', 'hello self from playwright'. One follow edge bob->alice (idempotent) + dms_enabled_followers toggle ended at TRUE for alice. Bob->alice DM 'hi alice xxxxxx' inserted then read by alice.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend changes for self-DM are solid. When writing Playwright for the Profile page, dismiss the first-login onboarding modal (it overlays the tab strip) OR drive clicks via page.evaluate("document.querySelector('[data-testid=...]').click()") — Playwright's force=True alone doesn't bypass the modal's pointer-events overlay. The same pattern applies to other onboarding-modal-gated screens. Use the BoardsTab selectors: boards-toggle, new-board-btn, board-title, board-tier-{public|followers|inner}, board-create. Profile tabs: tab-media (default), tab-wall, tab-audio. Messages page: thread-self is always index 0, has 'Me, myself and I' label + orange star avatar + 'Saved · only you can see this'; thread-{handle} for the rest.

verified_flows.backend_self_dm_send: alice -> alice w/ followers DMs off → 200, read:true, from==to
verified_flows.backend_self_thread_always_listed: alice list_threads[0].with.is_self=true; brand-new registered user threads[0].is_self=true with last:null
verified_flows.backend_self_history: GET /dms/with/{me} returns is_self=true, can_send=true, reason='', idempotent
verified_flows.backend_privacy: bob GET /dms/with/{alice_id} sees zero alice->alice messages and no SECRET marker
verified_flows.backend_regression_follower_ok: bob->alice OK when bob follows + alice.dms_enabled_followers=true; unread_dms incremented then decremented after alice opened thread
verified_flows.frontend_profile_three_tabs: tab-media (default selected, orange), tab-wall, tab-audio present; tab-feed/tab-pinned/tab-boards do NOT exist
verified_flows.frontend_pinned_ribbon: data-testid='pinned-ribbon' absent when alice has 0 pins (correct — not an empty placeholder)
verified_flows.frontend_wall_tab_boards: boards-toggle collapsible found, opens to reveal new-board-btn → form with board-title + tier-public/followers/inner + board-create. Created 'Test Board ####' with tier=followers, 'Board created' toast appeared.
verified_flows.frontend_wall_post: wall-input + wall-submit posted 'wall note from pw', 'Posted to wall' toast confirmed
verified_flows.frontend_self_thread: thread-self at index 0 with '★ Me, myself and I' label and 'SAVED · ONLY YOU CAN SEE THIS' hint
verified_flows.frontend_self_thread_open: Clicking thread-self routes to /m/{alice_id}; header shows 'Me, myself and I' self-themed; dm-input + dm-send sends 'hello self from playwright' and message appears.

rca of the issue: n/a — no production bugs identified this iteration.
